welcome_subtitle: Sign in with your email — we'll send a one-time code.
google_not_configured: Google Sign-In is not configured yet.
otp_subtitle: Enter the 6-digit code we sent to {{email}}.
error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
google_callback_subtitle: Hang tight — finishing your Google sign-in.
google_callback_error_body: We couldn't complete Google sign-in. Please try again.
google_callback_error_state: Security check failed. Please start over.
google_callback_error_missing: Google didn't return a token. Please try again.
terms_line: By continuing, you agree to Ztract's <terms>Terms of Service</terms> and <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>, and to receive periodic emails with updates.
testimonial_quote: Ztract turned a pile of unstructured PDFs into clean JSON in minutes. It's the fastest path from document to data we've found.
